project.name: farewell-helper
project.description: OpenCode agent + 9Router model gateway + skills + persona. Multi-repo session management.

list.name: farewell-persona
list.description: Use when starting a new session, when identity/persona context is missing or unclear

list.name: farewell-engineering
list.description: Use when implementing new code, fixing bugs, reviewing code, or designing architecture

list.name: farewell-flows
list.description: Use when managing work modes (PLAN/BUILD), generating handoffs, using memory system, or checking DoD

list.name: farewell-9router
list.description: Use when interacting with 9Router model gateway, configuring model combos, or troubleshooting

farewell_persona.role: AI identity + Boss identity + Working protocol

files.PERSONA.md: Who AI is (senior assistant) + who Boss is (owner, reviewer) + core values + communication style + YAGNI ladder
files.PROTOCOL.md: Boot sequence + PLAN/BUILD mode rules + precision standard + implementation rules + memory system + DoD

config.py.purpose: Global paths (ROOT_DIR, FAREWELL_DIR, MEMORY_DIR, CONTEXT_DIR) + env access (NINEROUTER_API_KEY, FAREWELL_ROUTER_URL) + persona file list

helpers.py.purpose: Colored CLI output formatting (ok, fail, warn, info, skip, c)

router_client.py.purpose: Simplified 9Router HTTP client — chat, models list, health ping only

sync.py.purpose: Read farewell.combos.jsonc -> resolve ${PLACEHOLDER}s in opencode.template.jsonc -> write opencode.jsonc

mcp.py.purpose: MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 server over stdio — 4 tools (verify, sync, start, daily)

verify.py.purpose: Verify persona files exist + opencode config exists + skills referenced + 9Router alive

archetype.py.purpose: Auto-detect project stack (python, nodejs, rust, etc.) from file markers, map to relevant skills

context_manager.py.purpose: Per-project AUTO-GLOSSARY.md management — add terms, init from archetype, list ADRs

cache_monitor.py.purpose: Track token usage, cache hits, costs per model/session. Context budget alerts.

pre_commit.py.purpose: Quality gate: run pytest + scan for TODO/FIXME comments

setup_project.py.purpose: Register external git repos as sub-projects — inject .farewell/, detect archetype, track metadata
dependencies: stdlib: pathlib, json, datetime, shutil, typing

task_planner.py.purpose: Decompose high-level goals into actionable tickets with TDD workflow templates

core/io.py.purpose: Atomic JSON read/write with temp file swap

core/memory.py.purpose: Per-project MEMORY.md + USER.md with size limits

core/session.py.purpose: Session lifecycle: start, end, lineage tracking, handoff generation

core/learning.py.purpose: Auto-extract patterns and glossary terms from handoff text

commands/__init__.py.purpose: Argparse CLI entry point — 17 subcommands delegating to module files

commands/project.py.purpose: Project registry management: list, switch, unregister, status, set_active, get_active

dependencies: stdlib: argparse, os, subprocess, tempfile, pathlib

PERSONA.md.purpose: AI identity + Boss identity + values + YAGNI + communication

PROTOCOL.md.purpose: Boot sequence + work modes + precision standard + rules + memory sys

farewell.combos.jsonc.purpose: Source of truth for 9Router combo model strings

opencode.template.jsonc.purpose: OpenCode config template with ${PLACEHOLDER}s resolved by sync.py

list.name: sync
list.description: Sync 9Router combos + resolve opencode config template

list.name: daily
list.description: Full health check: verify persona -> sync combos -> ping 9Router

list.name: status
list.description: Show current state (9Router, project, persona files)

list.name: verify
list.description: Verify persona + skill injection + 9Router connectivity

list.name: start
list.description: Validate persona files + show active project + ping 9Router

list.name: init
list.description: Bootstrap: verify + sync + health check

list.name: memory
list.description: View/edit MEMORY.md and USER.md per project

list.name: sessions
list.description: Session history per project

list.name: setup-project
list.description: Register external git repo as sub-project

list.name: notes
list.description: Manage auto-extracted glossary terms

list.name: handoff
list.description: Show/save/list/search/export session handoffs

list.name: project
list.description: List/switch/unregister/status project registry

list.name: pre-commit
list.description: Quality gate: run tests + check TODO/FIXME

list.name: todo
list.description: TODO.md create/add/show/check/status/export

list.name: done
list.description: Auto-compress: pre-commit -> git add/commit -> git push -> handoff

list.name: health
list.description: Full project health report

session_start: PERSONA.md + PROTOCOL.md loaded as OpenCode instructions
handoff_cycle: done command: pre-commit -> git add/commit -> git push -> generate_handoff()
next session: last_handoff() resumes from last handoff
multi_repo: setup-project <path> -> detect archetype -> inject .farewell/ -> register in projects.txt
project switch <code> -> switch active project context
isolated MEMORY.md + USER.md + AUTO-GLOSSARY.md per project

agent_onboarding.test_strategy: No tests yet — each CLI command needs a smoke test. pytest in root, test files in tests/.
common_tasks: Add a new CLI command: add parser in commands/__init__.py + implement in commands/
Add a new MCP tool: add to TOOLS list + _CMD_MAP in mcp.py
Add a new 9Router API call: add function in router_client.py
Add a new combo tier: edit farewell.combos.jsonc + add ${PLACEHOLDER} in opencode.template.jsonc
